units.source: Understanding Strategy Risk | Advances in Financial Machine Learning
units.translation: 理解策略风险｜金融机器学习进阶

units.source: As we saw in Chapters 3 and 13, investment strategies are often implemented in terms of positions held until one of two conditions are met: (1) a condition to exit the position with profits (profit-taking), or (2) a condition to exit the position with losses (stop-loss). Even when a strategy does not explicitly declare a stop-loss, there is always an implicit stop-loss limit, at which the investor can no longer finance her position (margin call) or bear the pain caused by an increasing unrealized loss. Because most strategies have (implicitly or explicitly) these two exit conditions, it makes sense to model the distribution of outcomes through a binomial process. This in turn will help us understand what combinations of betting frequency, odds, and payouts are uneconomic. The goal of this chapter is to help you evaluate when a strategy is vulnerable to small changes in any of these variables.
units.translation: 第 3 章和第 13 章已经讲过，投资策略通常会一直持有仓位，直到满足以下两个条件之一：（1）盈利退出，即止盈；（2）亏损退出，即止损。即使策略没有明确设置止损，也一定存在隐含的止损极限：浮亏扩大到某个程度后，投资者可能无力继续为仓位融资（被追缴保证金），或无法再承受亏损。大多数策略都以显式或隐式方式设置了这两类退出条件，因此用二项过程描述结果分布是合理的。这样可以分析下注频率、命中概率和盈亏幅度怎样组合时不具备经济可行性。本章的目标，是帮助读者判断策略是否会因其中任一变量的小幅变化而变得脆弱。

units.source: This highlights the risks involved in this strategy, because a relatively small drop in

units.source: ) will wipe out all the profits. The strategy is intrinsically risky, even if the holdings are not. That is the critical difference we wish to establish with this chapter: Strategy risk should not be confused with portfolio risk. Most firms and investors compute, monitor, and report portfolio risk without realizing that this tells us nothing about the risk of the strategy itself. Strategy risk is not the risk of the underlying portfolio, as computed by the chief risk officer. Strategy risk is the risk that the investment strategy will fail to succeed over time, a question of far greater relevance to the chief investment officer. The answer to the question “What is the probability that this strategy will fail?” is equivalent to computing
units.translation: 后，利润就会全部消失。即使所持资产本身风险不高，策略也可能内在地十分危险。这正是本章要强调的关键区别：策略风险不能与投资组合风险混为一谈。大多数机构和投资者都会计算、监控并报告投资组合风险，却没有意识到这些指标并不能说明策略本身的风险。首席风险官计算的底层投资组合风险，并不等于策略风险。策略风险是投资策略长期无法成功的风险，这个问题对首席投资官更为重要。“该策略失败的概率是多少？”等价于计算
